steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both equations equal $y$, so set their right sides equal.
$$8x=x^2-20$$

steps.title: Solve the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor.
$$x^2-8x-20=0$$
$$(x-10)(x+2)=0$$
The positive solution is $x=10$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Graph the two equations and read the positive intersection's $x$-coordinate.
The answer is 10.
